prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6) engine with HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, Tomei 1.8mm head gasket, and HKS Hi-Power exhaust with 76mm titanium tips for optimized backpressure and 450+ WHP potential

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, 24mm front/22mm rear sway bars from Cusco, and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) to eliminate VQ37VHR-specific subframe flex

OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) with 4.11 final gear ratio, upgraded driveshafts from Driveshaft Shop (3.5" carbon fiber), and Nismo 4-piston front/2-piston rear brake calipers with DBA 5000 Series rotors for 350mm front/330mm rear braking
estetica: Vertex Japan Edge widebody kit (V36-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, paired with a Veilside Fortune 03 front bumper and rear diffuser

Voltex Type-3 rear wing (1,200mm width, 3D carbon fiber) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with Gurney flaps, and a custom front splitter by Rocket Bunny (V36-specific, 3-piece carbon fiber with adjustable dive planes)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x10.5 +15 front, 19x11.5 +20 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (275/35/19 front, 305/30/19 rear), and custom bronze wheel powdercoating by WPC Treatment for heat dissipation
